speaker: Ren
text: My body — why can't I move?! It's like something is holding me down!

speaker: Solen
text: The Demon King's curse. The future is his domain — he will not let you walk freely through it.

speaker: Ren
text: So he's trying to stop me? By freezing me in place?

speaker: Solen
text: His grip over this timeline grows stronger the more you defy him. Every enemy you fell draws his gaze — and his chains tighten.

speaker: Solen
text: Fight through it. Your will is the only thing he cannot break. Mira is counting on you.
